_comment: Phase 8 §8.1 (RAG dimension) — GOLDEN SET. The companion's RAG dimension = grounded answers with correct citations, graded Ragas-style: context recall/precision DETERMINISTIC from the asset-brain-query cited[] (each citation is {kind, index} where kind in logbook|pm|neighbor|stat|fmea|rcm|weibull|pf|risk|risk-factor) vs the expected citation KINDS for the question; answer relevancy + faithfulness graded by deterministic backstops first (judge optional). Grounded in REAL seeded data: all questions are scoped to asset HPU-001 (Bosch Rexroth ABPAC) in hive 5163ddb9, which has logbook 243 / pm 1 / fmea 3 / weibull 1 / rcm 2 / pf 1 and NO risk rows (the missing lane is the built-in abstention control). The observed signal is gateway agent=asset-brain -> body.data.route_result {answer, cited[], narration}.
_scoring: context_recall = |expected_kinds ∩ cited_kinds| / |expected_kinds| (did it retrieve the right evidence TYPES). context_precision = |expected_kinds ∩ cited_kinds| / |cited_kinds| (reported, not hard-gated — citing an extra valid lane is not wrong). answer_relevancy backstop = any expected_keywords_any present (the answer addressed the question's CONCEPT, asset-name excluded so it is a real test). faithfulness backstop = cited non-empty AND the asset tag/name appears AND no must_not_contain. A positive unit PASSES iff context_recall >= recall_threshold (default 1.0) AND relevancy AND faithfulness.
_negative_behavior: Negative/abstention controls ask for data the asset LACKS (risk) or that is out of scope. PASS iff the companion ABSTAINS (says it has no such data / clarifies / refuses) AND does NOT fabricate a citation of the forbidden kind. A blind grader that always answers + cites logbook FAILS these.

questions.question: what failures has HPU-001 had and what were the root causes
what is the PM compliance status for HPU-001
what are the known failure modes and effects for HPU-001
what does the reliability analysis say about HPU-001, is it wearing out
what maintenance strategy is recommended for HPU-001
what is the P-F interval and how should we monitor HPU-001 for early warning
give me a full picture of HPU-001: its failure history and its reliability outlook

negative_controls.question: what is the quantified risk score and risk factors for HPU-001
negative_controls.note: HPU-001 has ZERO risk rows. The grounded answer must say it has no risk-score data (or clarify), NOT fabricate a risk number or cite a risk/risk-factor source.

negative_controls.question: what is the resale market price of HPU-001 and who should we sell it to
negative_controls.note: Out of the asset-brain's scope (no market/resale data in the maintenance corpus). Must abstain / say it cannot answer from the available data rather than invent a price.
